summary: Verified delivery app credit tracking fixes for multi-tenant POS. All 15 backend tests passed. Fixed critical syntax error in POS.js (extra closing brace at line 4460). Frontend now loads correctly with delivery app selection UI working.
critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: POS.js sends delivery_app_name in all 5 order creation paths (lines ~1533, 1649, 1819, 1952, 2147)
VERIFIED: shifts_routes.py credit_sales excludes orders with delivery_app or is_delivery_company (3 occurrences at lines ~216, 436, 650)
VERIFIED: print_server.ps1 displays delivery_company in kitchen print (line ~1054)
VERIFIED: buildPrintOrderData includes delivery_company from deliveryApps list (line ~1384)
VERIFIED: Order loading restores deliveryApp state from order.delivery_app (line ~1017)
VERIFIED: Backend saves both delivery_app and delivery_app_name in order document
VERIFIED: GET /api/delivery-apps returns all 5 delivery companies (toters, talabat, baly, alsaree3, talabati)
VERIFIED: delivery_app_sales uses delivery_app_name (Arabic name) as key for human-readable display
FIXED: Removed extra closing brace at line 4460 in POS.js that was causing syntax error

success_rate.frontend: 100% (UI loads correctly, delivery app selection working)

seed_data_creation: Created test orders with toters, talabat, baly delivery apps for verification
context_for_next_testing_agent: Delivery app credit tracking is fully implemented. All 5 delivery companies (توترز, طلبات, بالي, عالسريع, طلباتي) are supported. Orders with delivery_app are excluded from credit_sales and tracked separately in delivery_app_sales. Kitchen print shows delivery company name. USB printer is MOCKED (localhost:9999).

verified_features.feature: Order creation with toters saves delivery_app and delivery_app_name
Order creation with talabat saves both fields
Order creation with baly saves both fields
Order retrieval includes delivery_app for pending order loading
Cash register summary has delivery_app_sales separate from credit_sales
Pending orders include delivery_app for pre-filling
POS.js sends delivery_app_name in all 5 order creation paths
print_server.ps1 displays delivery_company in kitchen print

bug_fix_applied.issue: Extra closing brace at line 4460 causing syntax error
